title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.820 - Sale, where held — notice, form — occupancy permit required, when
text:
92.820.  Sale, where held — notice, form — occupancy permit required, when. — 1.  At the front door of the courthouse of the city of _________  at which sales of real estate are customarily made by the sheriff under execution, the sheriff shall advertise by posting the notice for sale and sell the respective parcels of real estate ordered sold by him pursuant to any judgment of foreclosure by any court under the provisions of sections 92.700 to 92.920.
  2.  Such advertisements by posting of notice of sale may include more than one parcel of real estate, and shall be in substantially the following form: 
(L. 1971 H.B. 472 § 22, A.L. 1984 H.B. 1500)
